textByHashes.34724765f7e9c9b9ab40281ef10e9ab1bec34590: You want play game of pinball, ?
textByHashes.c3338e10ed355802cdab89cdc3523f8d02cc6f83: No, no. If you poke dem ones dat don't have a dem flashin' rings, den dats bad.
textByHashes.065efe296a1438b166ad31b65dd55fd47ba49ee7: Yer. You do dat ten times, you get prize.
textByHashes.82b9616377013c53c6cb95e853e3a2a178162f71: Yer, get going. We get break now.
